name: cuebook
description: Query Cuebook market intelligence or create source-linked trading viewpoints, 2680 x 1056 visuals, settlement protocols, and release-ready content.

interface.shortDescription: Query Cuebook data or create sourced market viewpoints
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two explicit modules. Query searches, reads, compares, and explains Cuebook assets, stories, evidence, market data, metrics, history, and public-media patterns without writing anything. Create preserves the user's trading idea, calls Query for missing current facts, and produces three calibrated text and exact 2680 x 1056 visual candidates. It can optionally compile a hash-linked settlement claim and prepare an approved release bundle without placing trades or silently publishing.
defaultPrompt: 查询 USO 最新叙事、市场状态和来源
比较 HOOD 与 COIN 的最新估值口径和市场表现
用这份查询结果创作三套可发布交易观点
